results.title: Indian Railways Approves ₹1,037 Crore for Three Major Projects Across Madhya Pradesh, Eastern Railway and Gujarat
results.description: Indian Railways has approved three major projects worth ₹1,037 crore, including the reconstruction of Indore's Shastri ROB, a ₹405 crore signalling modernization project on Eastern Railway, and the ₹493 crore Adipur-Bhuj doubling project in Gujarat.

results.title: Univar Solutions Expands Exclusive Beauty, Personal Care, and Pharmaceutical Ingredients Partnership with American Distilling in EMEA
results.description: Strategic expansion of botanical extracts portfolio strengthens regional support for beauty and personal care and pharmaceutical customers

results.title: CtrlS Secures ₹7,000 Crore Commitment from CPP Investments to Scale Datacenter Infrastructure in India
results.description: At a Pre-Money Valuation of ₹44,914 Crore (C$6.6 Billion) INR 3,000 Crore (C$441 Million) of the Proceeds to Be Used to Form a Joint Venture HYDERABAD, India, June 17, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- CtrlS Datacenters Ltd. today announced a strategic partnership with Canada Pension Plan Investment...

results.title: Malcolm Group adds Aebi Schmidt sweeper to fleet
results.description: Malcolm Group has added a Street King 660 truck-mounted sweeper from Aebi Schmidt UK to its fleet.

results.title: Stock market rally continues on 4th day: Sensex up 347 points, Nifty crosses 24,000: 7 key reasons behind the surge today

results.title: PH growth outlook still favorable despite global uncertainty
results.description: THE government is pursuing reforms to strengthen the Philippines’ economic resilience and sustain inclusive growth amid global uncertainties
